message:
feat(event-stream): add streaming event/wait interfaces for deterministic automation (ft-3681t.4.2)

Implements cursor-based streaming, filtered subscriptions, and condition-based
wait primitives so autonomous agents can coordinate against real system state
with deterministic ordering and reconnect semantics.

New types: StreamCursor, EventStreamFilter (builder pattern), WaitCondition
(RuleId/PaneDetection/AnyOf/AllOf), EventWaiter, FilteredEventStream,
SubscriptionRegistry. Also fixes borrow checker errors in lock_orchestration.rs
(added by linter) and registers both modules in lib.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
